rationale: The US-Iran deal progress and continued Lebanon strikes are the most relevant developments for Poland, primarily through potential energy price relief, but no qualitative escalation beyond last cycle.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly near, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: A near-finalized US-Iran deal could ease energy market tensions relevant to Polish gas/electricity prices, but ongoing Lebanon strikes show fragility. No decisive breakthrough yet.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US government-ordered AI restrictions have limited indirect relevance to Poland as an EU tech consumer, but signals growing Western AI regulation pressure.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire via SpaceX IPO
top_events.summary: Musk's wealth milestone has negligible direct impact on Polish residents' daily lives; minor background financial market noise.
